response.justification: While the candidate is a talented full-stack engineer with strong geospatial expertise and systems thinking, they lack critical modern C++ and Rust experience required for this role. C++ expertise ended in 2014-2015 with recent work focused on TypeScript/Node.js. Additionally, their geospatial background is in mapping and GIS platforms rather than navigation guidance systems or data pipeline optimization.
strengths: Strong geospatial and mapping platform expertise across multiple projects (GISCollective, Green Map, MercadoLibre)
Proven distributed systems and low-latency development experience (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/second)
Exceptional adaptability across technical domains with strong software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Modern C++ expertise severely outdated (2014-2015); recent work is TypeScript/Node.js
No Rust experience despite being listed as acceptable alternative to C++
GIS/mapping background rather than navigation guidance systems or pipeline optimization

key_factors.factor: Missing navigation systems and pipeline optimization experience
